name: OpenSpeedTest
tagline: OpenSpeedTest is a self-hosted speedtest. You can read more about this on https://openspeedtest.com/selfhosted-speedtest.
description:
OpenSpeedTest is a self-hosted speedtest. You can read more about this on https://openspeedtest.com/selfhosted-speedtest.


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  openspeedtest:
    image: index.docker.io/openspeedtest/latest:speedtest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42090:3000
